message:
chore: broaden beads lock file gitignore to cover all .beads/*.lock

Replace the specific .beads/.bv.lock pattern with .beads/*.lock to
also cover .beads/.sync.lock (br sync) and any future lock files
that beads tooling might create.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -27,8 +27,8 @@ Cargo.lock.bak
 # Beads viewer local config
 .bv/
 
-# bv creates a local lock file inside .beads/; it must not be committed.
-.beads/.bv.lock
+# Beads lock files (bv viewer lock, br sync lock, etc.)
+.beads/*.lock
 
 # Legacy WezTerm source (vendored for reference)
 legacy_wezterm/
